description: Fragment of a legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). Concerning the sale of an enslaved man (ghulām) possibly named Bakhtiyār. One of the parties is the widow of Tamīm ha-Kohen. (Information in part from CUDL) Cf. T-S 24.64 (PGPID 5538) for another enslaved person named Bakhtiyār.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
